authorization_phrase_detected: YES start P179 replay product governance backlog decision gate

current_state_confirmation.historical_replay_infrastructure: RETAINED for transparency and audit value

governance_backlog_options.label: MAIN_ZEN_GATES_RECONCILIATION_PLAN_ONLY
governance_backlog_options.description: Produce a detailed plan for reconciling main/zen-gates split. Plan only — no execution of migration, merge, or DB write.
scope: Enumerate code/docs/tests gaps between main and zen-gates branches
Evaluate 3 reconcile options: (A) promote zen-gates to main, (B) backport zen-gates research to main, (C) maintain parallel branches with documented divergence
Define per-step authorization chain for any future DB migration
Produce acceptance criteria for reconciled state
Assess bet_index column migration risk for main DB (currently ABSENT)
risks: HIGH — main DB has 54462 rows, no bet_index; zen-gates has 94924 rows with bet_index
Any DB migration requires subsequent separate authorization with exact phrase
Code merge conflicts from P161-P178A research chain not present in main
test suite (P161-P178A contracts) exists only in zen-gates worktree
governance_backlog_options.output: Plan artifact only — no merge, no migration, no schema change
governance_backlog_options.estimated_value: HIGH — resolves the most significant outstanding governance risk

governance_backlog_options.label: REPLAY_PRODUCT_BACKLOG_AUDIT_PLAN_ONLY
governance_backlog_options.description: Audit the remaining replay product backlog and prioritize open items. Plan only — no new feature implementation.
scope: Review P149-P159B replay product governance chain completion status
Identify remaining UI/API polish items (e.g., multi-bet display, bet_index API exposure)
Assess operator guide and lifecycle visibility gaps
List open items with priority and acceptance criteria
risks: Medium risk if backlog items are confused with new feature development
governance_backlog_options.output: Prioritized backlog list with acceptance criteria — no implementation

governance_backlog_options.label: LONG_TERM_MONITORING_GOVERNANCE_PLAN_ONLY
governance_backlog_options.description: Define a low-cost passive monitoring governance process for P108/P117/P118/4_STAR and POWER_LOTTO wait-states. Plan only.
scope: Document current wait-states for P108 (100 Special3 draws), P117 (40 POWER_LOTTO draws), P118 (exact authorization phrase), 4_STAR (provenance artifact)
Clarify which triggers use P123 wrapper and which do not
Confirm: no cron/launchd scheduler installed without separate authorization
Define human-review cadence for checking trigger conditions
Specify that POWER_LOTTO passive monitoring requires >=500 new draws and separate authorization
risks: Avoid scheduler installation without explicit authorization
governance_backlog_options.output: Monitoring governance document — no scheduler, no new triggers
governance_backlog_options.estimated_value: MEDIUM — maintains oversight of pending trigger conditions

governance_backlog_options.label: REOPEN_POWER_LOTTO_RESEARCH
governance_backlog_options.description: Reopen active POWER_LOTTO strategy research or feature engineering.
governance_backlog_options.rationale_for_rejection: P178A closure policy is active. 17 strategies/candidates across R1+R2 all returned NULL. Reopen conditions require >=500 new draws after 115000041 (currently 0 available), documented structural change, or independent evidence. None of these conditions are currently met.
risks: Multiple testing inflation from cumulative null evidence
governance_backlog_options.allowed_only_if: P178A reopen conditions met: >=500 new POWER_LOTTO draws after 115000041, OR documented structural change, OR independent evidence, OR new pre-registered hypothesis with power calculation

cto_recommendation.primary: Option A + Option B — decision gate sequencing
cto_recommendation.not_recommended: Option D unless P178A reopen conditions are met
cto_recommendation.sequencing: Run Option A (reconciliation plan) and Option B (backlog audit) in parallel as plan-only tasks. Option C (monitoring governance) can follow independently.
cto_recommendation.recommendation_text: With POWER_LOTTO R2 research formally closed, the highest-value next steps are resolving the main/zen-gates governance split and auditing the replay product backlog. These are tractable, have clear business value, and do not require new research capabilities. The reconciliation plan (Option A) should be the first P180 task as it addresses the most significant outstanding governance risk.
cto_recommendation.power_lotto_note: POWER_LOTTO research remains closed. Do not restart unless P178A reopen conditions are met. C07 hybrid aggregation (P176, p_bonf=0.292) was the strongest signal seen — still far from corrected threshold of 0.0125. This does not justify reopening.
cto_recommendation.main_zen_gates_note: The 40,462-row delta and missing bet_index column in main represent the most significant unresolved technical debt. Any reconciliation requires careful per-step authorization.
